{{Quote|I have removed myself from your command, General Antilles, I will not have my people sit idle in their own system, not without a good explanation. You have refused to give me one. If you will not sustain the re-conquest of Duro, I am forced to do it myself.|[[Yurf Col]] moments before his death|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''</ref>}}
'''Yurf Col''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] from [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. Following the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]], he became the [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in charge of [[Duro Squadron]], and fought in the [[Battle of the Duro system|battle]] in the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]]. At the battle, Col became extremely critical of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], due to his unwillingness to share his strategy and inability to reclaim Duro. Col was [[Death/Legends|killed]] with his forces when he broke ranks and attacked the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces despite Antilles' order to hold their positions.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
